			column YearMonth3 = ```
					
					 var x =  max(Dim_date[YearMonthSort])
					 return
					IF(Dim_date[YearMonthSort] = X ,"Latest Month",[YearMonth2])
					```
				lineageTag: e925af78-67d1-41d5-b70b-89327a8ae133
				summarizeBy: none
				sortByColumn: YearMonthSort

				annotation SummarizationSetBy = Automatic

			partition dim_date = calculated
				mode: import
				source =
						ADDCOLUMNS(
						CALENDAR(MIN('fact'[Date]),MAX('TOC Act -2026'[Date])),
						"Year", YEAR([Date]),
						"Quarter", "Q" & FORMAT ( [Date], "Q" ),
						"Month", MONTH([Date]),
						"Month Short", FORMAT ( [Date], "mmm" ),
						"Week", FORMAT ( [Date], "ww" ),
						"WeekDay", WEEKDAY([Date]),
						"Day", DAY([Date]),
						"Day Short", FORMAT ( [Date], "ddd" ),
						"Fiscal Year","FY"& IF(MONTH([Date]) <=6, Year([Date]), YEAR([Date])+1),
						"Month Fiscal sort", IF(MONTH([Date]) <=6, MONTH([Date])+6,MONTH([Date])-6),
						"Working Date", IF(WEEKDAY([Date])=1, "No", "Yes"),
						"YearMonth" , FORMAT ( [Date], "mmm/YYYY" ),
						"YearMonth2" , FORMAT ( [Date], "mm" )&"/"&YEAR([Date]),
						"YearQuarter" , YEAR([Date])&"-"& "Q" & FORMAT ( [Date], "Q" ),
						"YearQuarter2" , "Q" & FORMAT ( [Date], "Q" ) &"/"& YEAR([Date]) ,
						"YearMonthSort", YEAR([Date])*100 + MONTH([Date]),
						"YearQuarterSort" ,YEAR([Date])*10 + FORMAT ( [Date], "Q" )
						)

			annotation PBI_Id = 75146eb6609148668ca70c341e184594

		table _Measure
			lineageTag: 08354659-9e23-46de-9bdf-475ab9665e54

			measure 'Cost of goods sold' = CALCULATE([Total (onyl SUM not any filter)],ALL(Helper),'Helper'[Lv2 Code] = 31000 )
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: _Lv2
				lineageTag: f6af191b-ce45-4adf-9870-fa675f0552bf

			measure 'Total (onyl SUM not any filter)' = SUM('fact'[Value])
				formatString: #,0
				lineageTag: 01a81421-9362-47ac-8675-5bc43911a2e0

			measure 'Metric for table' = ```
					
					IF(ISINSCOPE(Helper[Lv1 Name]), [Total (onyl SUM not any filter)], 
					IF(ISINSCOPE(Helper[Lv2 Name]), 
					    SWITCH (
					        TRUE(),
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv2 Name] ) = "Total net sales", [Total net sales],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv2 Name] ) ="Cost of goods sold", [Cost of goods sold],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv2 Name] ) ="Total variable production cost", [Total variable production cost],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv2 Name] ) ="Total fixed production costs", [Total fixed production costs],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv2 Name] ) ="Total fixed production costs.", [Total fixed production costs (Sales)],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv2 Name] ) ="Total administration costs", [Total administration costs],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv2 Name] ) ="Total other (income - / expense +)", [Total other (income - / expense +)],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv2 Name] ) ="EBIT", [EBIT],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv2 Name] ) ="EBT", [EBT],
					        blank())
					, 
					IF(ISINSCOPE(Helper[Lv3 Name]), 
					    SWITCH (
					        TRUE(),
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv3 Name] ) = "Gross Margin", [Gross Margin],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv3 Name] ) = "Contribution Margin I", [Contribution Margin I],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv3 Name] ) = "Contribution Margin II", [Contribution Margin II],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv3 Name] ) = "Contribution Margin III", [Contribution Margin III],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv3 Name] ) = "Contribution Margin IV", [Contribution Margin IV],
					        SELECTEDVALUE ( Helper[Lv3 Name] ) = "Net Income", [Net Income],
					        BLANK() 
					        )
					)))
					    
					
					```
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: P/L statement
				lineageTag: 08e84a39-8b15-4e3a-8e7e-32fdd791c5cf

			measure 'Total net sales' = CALCULATE([Total (onyl SUM not any filter)], ALL(Helper),'Helper'[Lv2 Code] = 23500 )
				formatString: #,0
				displayFolder: _Lv2
				lineageTag: 375b65de-1399-4d3f-81f1-105ab0a71a30

					VAR _MaxTargetInScope =

					VAR _AxisRange        = _BarMax - _BarMin

					VAR _Table =

					VAR _PrevTargetNormalized =
					    IF(

					        (_PrevTarget * _AxisRange) + _BarMin - 1
					    )
					
					VAR _NextTarget =

					    )
					VAR _NextTargetNormalized =

					    )
					
					/*
					   Offsets for connecting lines:
					   - The row above's marker is at y=_MarkerY in its own cell.
					     From the perspective of the current cell, that is y = _MarkerY - _CellHeight.
					   - The row below's marker is at y=_MarkerY in its own cell, which is y = _MarkerY + _CellHeight
					     from the perspective of the current cell.
					*/
					VAR _PrevMarkerY = _MarkerY - _CellHeight
					VAR _NextMarkerY = _MarkerY + _CellHeight
					
					/* Polylines */
					VAR _ConnectingLineUp =
					    IF(
					        _CurrentRank > 1 && NOT ISBLANK(_PrevTargetNormalized),
					        "<polyline points='"

					            & _TargetNormalized & "," & _MarkerY

					    )
					
					VAR _ConnectingLineDown =

					        ""
					    )
					
					/* Build a path for the actual bar with rounded right-side corners only */
					VAR _ActualBarPath =
					    "M " & _BarMin & " " & _BarY & 
					    " L " & (_BarMin + _ActualNormalized - _BarRoundness) & " " & _BarY & 
					    " A " & _BarRoundness & " " & _BarRoundness & " 0 0 1 " & (_BarMin + _ActualNormalized) & " " & (_BarY + _BarRoundness) & 
					    " L " & (_BarMin + _ActualNormalized) & " " & (_BarY + _BarHeight - _BarRoundness) & 
					    " A " & _BarRoundness & " " & _BarRoundness & " 0 0 1 " & (_BarMin + _ActualNormalized - _BarRoundness) & " " & (_BarY + _BarHeight) & 
					    " L " & _BarMin & " " & (_BarY + _BarHeight) &

					VAR _NormalCircle =
					    "<circle cx='" & _TargetNormalized & "' cy='" & _MarkerY & "' r='" & _MarkerSize & "' fill='" & _TargetColor & "'/>"
					
					VAR _CutoffCircle =

					    "<circle cx='" & _TargetNormalized & "' cy='" & _MarkerY & "' r='" & _CutoffInnerSize & "' fill='white'/>"

					VAR _YMin = 0   // For _CellHeight = 30 and _MarkerY = 15, _YMin = -15 (set to 0 if you prefer)
					VAR _ViewBoxHeight = _CellHeight   // 30 in this case

					VAR _BarBaseline =

					    "<rect x='" & _BarMin & "' y='2' width='" & _BarMax & "' height='80%' fill='" & _BackgroundColor & "'/>"

					    _SvgSuffix
